title: Procheiron supersession lineage entry
description: One JSON object per non-empty line of {paths.memory}/index/supersessions.jsonl — append-only structured lineage. The validator reads old_id/new_id (with legacy aliases superseded_id/superseding_id) to corroborate structured supersedes[] claims (validate_procheiron2 lines 368-375). memory_promote.py writes the canonical old_id/new_id/at/actor/reason form.

superseded_id.description: Legacy alias for old_id (validator accepts both).

allOf.$comment: An old_id is required, under either the canonical key or the legacy alias.
A new_id is required, under either the canonical key or the legacy alias.
